source_section.title_label_raw: Site Plan Approval Matters Subject to Site Plan Approval

sections.title_label_raw: Approval Matters Subject to Site Plan Approval

provisions.heading_context_raw: Approval Matters Subject to Site Plan Approval
provisions.text: Within the DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, or RPK zone, any development requesting a variation listed under Subsection 15(2), shall be subject to site plan approval.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Approval Matters Subject to Site Plan Approval
provisions.text: The following items may be considered for a variation of the requirements of this By-law through site plan approval, if the requested variation meets the variation criteria contained in

provisions.heading_context_raw: Approval Matters Subject to Site Plan Approval
provisions.text: roof edge setbacks of height-exempted building rooftop features;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Approval Matters Subject to Site Plan Approval
provisions.text: streetwall articulation;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Approval Matters Subject to Site Plan Approval
provisions.text: grade-oriented premises;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Approval Matters Subject to Site Plan Approval
provisions.text: maximum building dimensions in the CEN-2, COR, HR-2, or HR-1 zone; (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Approval Matters Subject to Site Plan Approval
provisions.text: unique building functionality;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Approval Matters Subject to Site Plan Approval
provisions.text: unique building design;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Approval Matters Subject to Site Plan Approval
provisions.text: cornice line height for new main buildings or additions to main buildings on a property abutting a registered heritage property or abutting a heritage conservation district; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Approval Matters Subject to Site Plan Approval
provisions.text: applicability of general design requirements for a new construction on a registered heritage property outside of a heritage conservation district. Site Plan Approval Applications

sections.title_label_raw: Any application for a site plan approval under Section 15 shall

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any application for a site plan approval under Section 15 shall
provisions.text: Any application for a site plan approval under Section 15 shall include:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any application for a site plan approval under Section 15 shall
provisions.text: documents and plans, drawn to scale, that show the information required in Section 10;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any application for a site plan approval under Section 15 shall
provisions.text: drawings, including elevations and architectural renderings, that:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any application for a site plan approval under Section 15 shall
provisions.text: show the relative scale of the development to any main building on the same lot as the development site, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any application for a site plan approval under Section 15 shall
provisions.text: show the relative scale of the development to any main buildings on lots abutting the development site, and illustrate any building or a portion of any building that is within 15.0 metres from any side or rear lot line;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any application for a site plan approval under Section 15 shall
provisions.text: a written statement explaining the nature and extent of the requested variation, as well as a rationale for the request based on the variation criteria contained in Part IX, to the satisfaction of the Development Officer; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any application for a site plan approval under Section 15 shall
provisions.text: illustrations showing the location and type of variation being requested.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any application for a site plan approval under Section 15 shall
provisions.text: If required by the Development Officer, an application for site plan approval under Section 15 shall include the following:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any application for a site plan approval under Section 15 shall
provisions.text: one architectural rendering for each streetline or transportation reserve, drawn from pedestrian eye-level, showing the streetwall and any public sidewalks, excluding features in the public right-of-way such as street trees, utility poles, and street furniture; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any application for a site plan approval under Section 15 shall
provisions.text: one architectural rendering for each streetline, showing the development at night, which illustrates compliance with the design requirement of Section 372.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any application for a site plan approval under Section 15 shall
provisions.text: An application for site plan approval under Section 15 shall include:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any application for a site plan approval under Section 15 shall
provisions.text: confirmation that the public information and consultation requirements of Sections 17 to 19 have been met;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any application for a site plan approval under Section 15 shall
provisions.text: a written summary of all public feedback; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any application for a site plan approval under Section 15 shall
provisions.text: the applicant's response to the feedback received from the public. Methods of Public Information and Consultation

sections.title_label_raw: Public information and consultation is required before applying

provisions.heading_context_raw: Public information and consultation is required before applying
provisions.text: Public information and consultation is required before applying for an application for site plan approval under Section 15, and shall include:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Public information and consultation is required before applying
provisions.text: a website, which meets the requirements of Section 18; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Public information and consultation is required before applying
provisions.text: a weather-proof sign on the development site, which meets the requirements of Section 19.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Public information and consultation is required before applying
provisions.text: The applicant shall create a complete record including feedback received from the website and from any correspondence, and shall submit it with the application for site plan approval. Public Information and Consultation: Website

sections.title_label_raw: The website specified in Clause 17(1)(a) shall:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The website specified in Clause 17(1)(a) shall:
provisions.text: The website specified in Clause 17(1)(a) shall:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The website specified in Clause 17(1)(a) shall:
provisions.text: contain:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The website specified in Clause 17(1)(a) shall:
provisions.text: information about the proposed project, including the location of the development and a description of any proposed variation to the requirements of this By-law,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The website specified in Clause 17(1)(a) shall:
provisions.text: plans and renderings, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The website specified in Clause 17(1)(a) shall:
provisions.text: contact information for a representative of the applicant, including a telephone number and email address;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The website specified in Clause 17(1)(a) shall:
provisions.text: contain an online feedback forum or an e-mail address clearly displayed on the webpage that allows for the submission of questions and comments from the public on the proposal; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The website specified in Clause 17(1)(a) shall:
provisions.text: be operational 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, for 14 calendar days before an application is submitted to the Municipality and until the end of the appeal period. Public Information and Consultation: Weather-Proof Sign

sections.title_label_raw: The weather-proof sign specified in Clause 17(1)(b) shall:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The weather-proof sign specified in Clause 17(1)(b) shall:
provisions.text: The weather-proof sign specified in Clause 17(1)(b) shall:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The weather-proof sign specified in Clause 17(1)(b) shall:
provisions.text: be displayed along each streetline of the development site;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The weather-proof sign specified in Clause 17(1)(b) shall:
provisions.text: contain:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The weather-proof sign specified in Clause 17(1)(b) shall:
provisions.text: a brief description of the project,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The weather-proof sign specified in Clause 17(1)(b) shall:
provisions.text: an architectural rendering of the project,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The weather-proof sign specified in Clause 17(1)(b) shall:
provisions.text: the internet address of the website specified in Clause 17(1)(a),

provisions.heading_context_raw: The weather-proof sign specified in Clause 17(1)(b) shall:
provisions.text: contact information for a representative of the applicant, including a telephone number and email address, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The weather-proof sign specified in Clause 17(1)(b) shall:
provisions.text: lettering in Arial font, bolded, and at a minimum font size of 90pt; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The weather-proof sign specified in Clause 17(1)(b) shall:
provisions.text: be displayed for 14 calendar days before an application is submitted to the Municipality and until the end of the appeal period. Notification of Approval

sections.title_label_raw: Where any site plan approval is granted, the Development Officer

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where any site plan approval is granted, the Development Officer
provisions.text: Where any site plan approval is granted, the Development Officer shall notify, in writing, every assessed property owner within 30 metres of the subject property. Appeal of Decision

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 21(2), a decision by the Development

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 21(2), a decision by the Development
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 21(2), a decision by the Development Officer to approve or refuse a site plan approval application may be appealed to Council in accordance with the Charter, as amended from time to time.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 21(2), a decision by the Development
provisions.text: Only the matters subject to site plan approval under Section 15 are appealable to Council. Advisory Committee

sections.title_label_raw: An advisory committee may be established by Council to provide

provisions.heading_context_raw: An advisory committee may be established by Council to provide
provisions.text: An advisory committee may be established by Council to provide recommendations to the Development Officer respecting applications for site plan approval under Section 15, and to perform other duties set by Council.
